entry.title: Bitácora de crédito (Vol. 5)

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Ahora actualizaremos el comportamiento de los otros métodos en el controlador de tarjetas de crédito. Nos falta: GET - Mostrarla PUT - Actualizarla DELETE - Eliminarla El GET es sencillo, bastará una línea de código para mostrar los datos de la tarjeta al usuario.

entry.title: Bitácora de crédito (Vol. 4)

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Este sprint vamos a implementar la lógica de los controladores. Un controlador sirve para procesar las solicitudes que le hacemos a nuestra API y devolver ciertos datos con base en las mismas. Ahora vamos a interactuar con la base de datos y con las solicitudes que hicimos la semana pasada.

entry.title: Bitácora de crédito (Vol. 3)

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Continuando con los form requests revisaremos que opciones nos dan para validar datos.

entry.title: Bitácora de crédito (vol. 2)

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: En este «sprint» (o lo que sea), vamos a continuar con el desarrollo de dos características principales. Primero comprobaremos que se puede iniciar sesión con un usuario, y que tiene acceso a ciertos permisos, luego continuaremos con la creación y edición de tarjetas de crédito asociadas a un usuario.

entry.title: Bitácora de crédito

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Hace algunos años que tengo una tarjeta de crédito, y me gusta bastante llevar un conteo exacto de que gasto y cuanto tengo disponible para pagarlo. Así que desde entonces he estado llevando una hoja de cálculo que se ve más o menos así

entry.title: Lecciones de Angular

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Llevo como 9 meses trabajando con Angular y es una historia graciosa porque me habían contratado para escribir React. Pero aunque al principio no estaba muy emocionado por pasar más de 1 mes en el proyecto, lo cierto es que me ha gustado mucho.

entry.title: Actualizar Webpack a Vite en Laravel Sail

link.title: Actualizar Webpack a Vite en Laravel Sail

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Laravel acaba de agregar soporte para Vite, una herramienta para desarrollo frontend muy poderosa, y tú puedes usarla si realizas unos pequeños cambios, como sugiere la página oficial para esta migración. Pero si además estás utilizando Sail, que es una útil herramienta para integrar Docker en tu entorno de desarrollo, además tendrás que hacer algunos otros cambios.

entry.title: Upgrading Webpack to Vite in Laravel Sail

link.title: Upgrading Webpack to Vite in Laravel Sail

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Laravel has just added support for Vite, a very powerful frontend development tool, and you can use it if you make some small changes, as suggested on the official page for this migration. But if you are also using Sail, which is a useful tool for integrating Docker into your development environment, you will also have to make some other changes.

entry.title: ¿Qué navegador usar?

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: Necesitas un navegador para entrar a Internet. Y seguramente usas uno a diario. Pero, ¿qué es precisamente un navegador? ¿Qué navegador podría ser mejor para ti? ¿Qué es un navegador? Un navegador es un software que te permite navegar por internet. Es decir, visualizar páginas web y aplicaciones web. Como cualquier otro software, existen una gran variedad de navegadores y muchos sirven a diferentes propósitos.

entry.title: Función para esperar algo

author.name: {"first_name"=>"Halí", "last_name"=>"Velázquez", "picture"=>"/assets/img/halivert.png", "kofi"=>"https://ko-fi.com/halivert", "sponsor"=>"https://github.com/sponsors/halivert", "email"=>"hi@halivert.dev", "social"=>[{"url"=>"https://twitter.com/halivert", "type"=>"twitter", "icon"=>"fab fa-twitter", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://t.me/halivert", "type"=>"telegram", "icon"=>"fab fa-telegram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://github.com/halivert", "type"=>"github", "icon"=>"fab fa-github"}, {"url"=>"https://gitlab.com/halivert", "type"=>"gitlab", "icon"=>"fab fa-gitlab"}, {"url"=>"https://discordapp.com/users/673717040095428628", "type"=>"discord", "icon"=>"fab fa-discord"}, {"url"=>"https://timeline.halivert.dev", "type"=>"polywork", "icon"=>"fab fa-polywork", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://www.linkedin.com/in/halivert/", "type"=>"linkedin", "icon"=>"fab fa-linkedin"}, {"url"=>"https://www.instagram.com/halivert/", "type"=>"instagram", "icon"=>"fab fa-instagram", "hidden"=>true}, {"url"=>"https://noc.social/@halivert", "type"=>"mastodon", "icon"=>"fab fa-mastodon", "hidden"=>true}]}

entry.summary: En este artículo quiero mostrarte algunas cosas acerca del lenguaje de programación JavaScript mediante el uso de una función que servirá para «esperar».
